title: Better Bunnies
body:
This mod adds a new mob, Bunnies to Minecraft

Bunnies are based on rabbits but chonkier and fluffier therefore cuter(animals being overweight is not cute irl)

# Mod Features
## Bunnies
The main feature of the mod.
There are currently 6 varients based on the Vanilla rabbit variants
Custom behaviour of bunnies includes loafing, thumping when hostile mobs are nearby and performing Binkys
![Bunny Types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99dab06cf0e1b50ff47827339d1d7832b2b17cda_0.webp)

## Bunbeds
A new custom block on which bunnies will lie down
![Bunbeds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/i0GhoR6h/images/450163d7503b7743c9ac621de0a01076382b1f1c.png)

# Future additions
- More complex behaviour
- A wider variety of breeds/variants
- More furniture
- Accessories/clothing for bunnies
- Kits sitting on your head
- Guidebook
- Update to latest version
